channel.title: Chana Mirel Photography Journal
channel.description: Guides and notes for Baltimore newborn, maternity, cake smash, and family photography clients.

item.title: When to Schedule Newborn Photos in Baltimore
item.description: The best age for newborn photos is five to fourteen days old. Here is why, how to book, and what options exist if you miss the window.

item.title: Studio vs In-Home Newborn Photography in Baltimore
item.description: Studio newborn sessions and in-home newborn sessions each have tradeoffs. Here is what actually matters for Baltimore families.

item.title: How to Choose a Newborn Photographer in Baltimore
item.description: Choosing a newborn photographer: portfolio depth, safety training, studio setup, and the details that matter for Baltimore families.

item.title: Cake Smash Session Tips for Baltimore First Birthdays
item.description: Cake smash tips for Baltimore first-birthday sessions. Outfit choices, timing, cake flavor, and the small things that make the hour work.

item.title: What to Wear for Family Photos in Baltimore
item.description: What to wear for studio family photos in Baltimore. A simple palette, season-by-season, that photographs beautifully every time.

item.title: Newborn Photography Investment Guide in Baltimore
item.description: What a newborn photography investment actually covers in Baltimore. Session, retouching, experience, and wall art, demystified.
